'''Tork''' was a [[Bouncer (occupation)/Legends|bouncer]] who worked at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], circa [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. He often worked with [[Ackmena/Legends|Ackmena]] and [[Sosio Kakra|her assistant]].

As a bouncer, his job was to eject intoxicated customers who were causing trouble, or simply unwilling to leave after the bar was closed down. He was helped in this by his fierce appearance and his intimidating size (well over two meters tall).

Though gruff, he was a close friend of Ackmena. Indeed, he, Ackmena, and Ackmena's assistant were almost like a family.

==Behind the scenes==
Tork was played by actor [[Mickey Morton]] in ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''.<ref>{{YouTube|video=MNsvzX1bLr0|text=CANTINARCHEOLOGY PART 4 FORTY YEARS OF THE STAR WARS HOLIDAY SPECIAL|channel=@CredibleNerds|name=The Credible Nerds}}</ref>
